Design Process Authenticity Evaluation

Domain: {{ participantDomain }} Evaluating {{ currentGlobalIndex + 1 }} of {{ surveyPhases.length }} phases Participant: {{ participantId }}

Welcome to the Design Process Evaluation Study

As a {{ participantDomain }} designer, you will review design process records from your domain and evaluate how authentic each designer's thinking process appears.

⚠️ No design domain was detected from your study link. Please select your domain below to continue.

What You'll Do:

  • Review detailed records of design project phases (think-aloud, decisions, requirements, outcomes).
  • Rate how authentic each designer's thinking process feels on a 1–7 scale.
  • Identify which cognitive states (ambiguity, vagueness, uncertainty, tacit knowledge) are present.
  • Optionally leave a short comment.

You will evaluate {{ domainPhaseCount }} design phases from {{ domainProjectCount }} {{ participantDomain }} projects.
